item.title: Shaq and Yao
item.dc:creator: august32021

item.title: Seeing my home town as a tourist
item.description:
Growing up I always thought of my home town as dull and boring.
And to be fair, growing up there WAS dull and boring.
However, it was and still is a beautiful historic town.
Coming back after almost 20 years gave me the opportunity to see it again, this time as a tourist.
So this is me revisiting the places and corners I grew up around.
The historic old town is now a world heritage site.
Most houses were built in the 1500-1600s and survived largely unchanged to this day.
Back in the day property tax was charged based on a house's ground floor square footage. Hence, people built their houses with small ground floors and expanded the upper floors outwards, creating these unique and magnificent houses.
Some houses are more magnificent than others.
We even got a castle!
It was a popular place 1000 years ago. Today, not so much.
You get a good view from castle hill. And look - a rainbow!
This house is older than most and dates back to 1346. It doesn't look like much but I find it awe-inspiring to walk past this almost 700 year old house.
Yeah, we got a literal Hell. The town is Quedlinburg, Germany. You should come and have a look, it's not too bad! Edit: Most Viral, wohoo! Thanks, history and architecture nerds of Imgur!
item.dc:creator: ReallyCoolSlimeMold

item.dc:creator: Pluiz

item.title: TIL: cloudhiker. Stumble upon but not
item.description: Idk I thought y’all would enjoy this a lot. I sure am enjoying it. FP edit! I forgot I did this before bed and was like what do you MEAN I have comments on a post I made?! So holy shit wow can’t wait to read all the cool things I know waiting below. Thank you so much and I’m so glad y’all did enjoy this as much as I thought you would! If you haven’t already and have tried this let us all know what cool places you discovered. Here’s a list of stupid websites I used to really like but have changed dramatically or died. Plus some that are exactly the same. Iamwesome.com (it’s true) Iwastesomuchtime.com Iwastesomuchmoney.com Slowrobot.com Grouchyrabbit.com Jellotime.com BOREDHUMANS.COM/FALLING_SAND.PHP YOUREWELCOME My Life is Average (y’all remember that?) Dear blank please blank (I miss these being funny-yes a lot of this list is other websites developed by them) Turns out jellotime is now on artsy.net/artwork/rafael-rozendaal-jellotime-com :(
item.dc:creator: ozawaonline

item.title: A super green performance
item.description: I had a coworker who had an annoying habit of hearing cynical opinions from somewhere and then spouting them off at work like they were deep thoughts. I forget why fifth element came up but he said something like "that movie's so stupid/ fake. The notes that opera singer sings are impossible for a human to sing, it's so obviously fake" and I said "really? The blue lady with a tentacle gord growing out the back of her head was doing non-human things?" It's fine when people point this out but it not being humanly possible to sing like that was probably the point since she was supposed to not be human.

item.title: Vent Relief
item.description: They denied my confession previously. If it ain't mutual it ain't mutual, that's just how things are. You can't change how someone else feels. I just didn't think my feelings would continue to last and hurt as much as they do. But it ain't their baggage or problem to deal with, just mine, so I guess keep on keeping on until enough time passes. Just sucks that time's a bitch that likes to take it slow.

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends. happy new year
crap i think i might be deaf
that's a weird name for a hearing aid
i'm sensing a theme going on..
nailed it
mmm hmm
i like the light side colors more than dark side
4 going on 44
cheezits always look good to me. oh and i can barely cook
always
genius. and totally looks like a normal rock
why do that though? silly.
"come for your girlfriend"
hell yeah i love sharks
people are always doing this
no
i grabbed this for the sign i have no idea what the anime reference is
that’s it for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Rules are for thee not for me!!!
item.description: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/aug/12/texas-fetus-rights-prison-guard-lawsuit-abortion#:~:text=The%20guard%20%E2%80%93%20who%20is%20named,the%20baby%20in%20a%20stillbirth. "The prison agency and the Texas attorney general’s office have argued in defense of the lawsuit that the agency should not be held responsible for the stillbirth and that it is not clear the fetus had rights as a person. Both entities advance those positions despite consistent arguments made in lockstep by the attorney general’s office and Texas legislators that “unborn children” should be recognized as people starting at fertilization."

item.title: Good girl
item.description:
Edit - Thanks for the updates and comments, everyone. Good girls who behave themselves at their vet checkup get a cheeky plain cheeseburger on the way home. Skye has developed a cough, so she went for a check over today. It seems like it's nothing major, and she's got meds to clear it up. She's an older lady so we don't take chances.
"The f**k you mean we're going to the vets?!"

This is a good cause to support!

item.dc:creator: CollinRubinstein

item.title: You are NOT getting the Epstein client list!!!!
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/jeffrey-epstein-ghislaine-maxwell-virginia-giuffre-3af500d4788ad45301be426628846d71 Please, please, please everyone understand you are being DISTRACTED and misinformed!!! The list that people keep discussing regarding Epstein is NOT the client list. All we are getting is a list of people's names who were redacted in a defamation lawsuit that involved Epstein. The people named in it are likely nothing more than listed as 'names' that came up in some form of discussion, but are decidedly NOT the Epstein client list. For instance, where Jimmy Kimmel has been mentioned as being in the list. He may be! It is likely nothing more than something like "And while I was laying down watching Jimmy Kimmel I received a phone call where I was told that Virginia had made allegations against Epstein" and that's the extent of it. No one listed in the redactions is even confirmed to be a client. Stop being satisfied, or drooling over this list, and make demands of the FBI to release the actual CLIENT LIST that we deserve to get, fully unredacted, fully documented, and for prosecution to begin on it!
item.dc:creator: OnFridaysWeWearBeskar

item.title: J. R. R. Tolkien was born this day, the 3rd of January 1892
